title: lullaboy: Hotels & Heartbreaks Tour - Live in Kuala Lumpur
summary: lullaboy – Hotels & Heartbreaks Tour 📍 Vox Live, Kuala Lumpur 🇲🇾 📅 15 July 2026 🕗 8:00 PM lullaboy brings his HOTELS & HEARTBREAKS TOUR to Kuala Lumpur for one unforgettable night. With over 200 million streams and a global fanbase of like-minded souls, lullaboy has built a world where vulnerability becomes a personal soundtrack - for sunny days, lonely nights, and everything in between. Known for his raw honesty and emotionally driven songwriting, he blends indie pop, R&B, emo-rock, folk, and gospel into deeply personal stories that feel intimate, relatable, and quietly powerful. His songs don’t just play once - they stay with you. This tour marks a new chapter. For the first time, lullaboy brings fans into the world of hotels & heartbreaks - a live experience that moves through love, loss, and healing. From stripped-back moments that feel like a late-night heart to heart, to full band highs that bring every emotion to life, the show takes you on a journey through the “12 floors” of heartbreak… and what comes after. Expect fan-favorite classics and new music from his latest album, performed the way they were meant to be felt: live. From studying under YG Entertainment to graduating from Berklee College of Music and songwriting at SM Entertainment, lullaboy’s rise has been anything but ordinary. As one of the first Spotify Asia RADAR artists, he has taken storytelling to major festival stages worldwide and his previous six-country tour. Now, after gaining global recognition, he returns to Kuala Lumpur on his nine-country tour. ✨ Don’t miss lullaboy live - an evening of music, emotion, and core memories that stay with you long after the night ends.

Afrodut is SWITCH3's latest genre-bending experience, fusing the raw attitude of Indonesian hip-hop, the infectious melodies of dangdut, and the irresistible bounce of Afrobeat and Amapiano into a single electrifying dancefloor experience. Making their Kuala Lumpur debut are Naufal Syachreza and dia from Jakarta's renowned creative collective AntiNRML —two artists at the forefront of Indonesia's new urban sound. Expect high-energy performances packed with hard-hitting rap, modern dangdut influences, Afro-inspired rhythms, and club-ready edits designed to keep you moving all night long. From Jakarta's underground to KL's nightlife, Afrodut T is where cultures collide, genres dissolve, and the dancefloor becomes one. This is more than a party—it's a celebration of the new wave of Southeast Asian club music. One night. One vibe. One movement. Afrodut — only at SWITCH3 Kuala Lumpur.

title: O&A PRES: ECZODIA

title: POST presents Altın Gün Live in KL
summary: For the first time, Altın Gün in Kuala Lumpur this July. The Amsterdam-based band have built a global following around their reinterpretation of Anatolian folk, drawing from the records they grew up on and reshaping them through psychedelia, disco, and groove-led arrangements. What started as a deep dive into Turkish folk traditions has evolved into something that travels easily — from intimate sessions to festival stages worldwide. Their live shows sit somewhere between a concert and a trance state — rhythmic, immersive, and constantly in motion. It’s music that feels both archival and immediate, familiar yet reassembled for a different time. Joining them on the night are local acts Capt’n Trips and The Kid, alongside Golden Mammoth. Tickets are released in limited allocations across phases. Early purchase is recommended.

title: DRIP KL Present: 19:26
summary: DRIP KL and Horizon proudly welcome 19:26 for an exclusive Kuala Lumpur performance on 17 July 2026 . A defining force in the new wave of melodic electronic music, 19:26 has built a reputation for blending cinematic emotion, neoclassical influences, and forward-thinking electronic sound design. His music exists in the space between memory and the future, where powerful melodies, hypnotic rhythms, and emotional storytelling converge to create unforgettable dancefloor moments. Following acclaimed releases on Afterlife and Siamese , 19:26 unveiled his most ambitious body of work to date with The Passage EP on Afterlife, a deeply personal exploration of transformation and inner transition. His breakout release XX became a defining milestone, reaching top positions on the Beatport charts and earning support across major international radio stations. His collaboration with Anyma , Giza , further cemented his place among the most exciting artists in melodic electronic music today. Supported by industry heavyweights including Tale Of Us, Anyma, MRAK, Adriatique, Mathame, Argy, Miss Monique, David Guetta, and Tiësto, 19:26 has captivated audiences worldwide through a sound that balances emotional depth with club-focused precision. His performances have taken him to some of the world's most iconic stages, including Afterlife Festival, Zamna, Hï Ibiza, Space Miami, Kappa Futur Festival, and the legendary Pyramids of Giza, where his set became a viral phenomenon celebrated for its cinematic intensity and emotional impact. Supporting him on the night are Victor G , WESUFO , and Boriz , who will set the tone with a carefully curated selection of melodic house, progressive sounds, and peak-time energy, creating the perfect build-up to the headline performance. For this special showcase, we're bringing the Sunset by Neon energy indoors. Transforming DRIP KL into an immersive journey of music, visuals, and atmosphere inspired by the festival's signature sound and energy. Now, for one night only, experience 19:26's immersive sound in the intimate setting of DRIP KL. For VIP table reservations contact +6018 788 0858.

title: Chabilates Vol. 02
summary: CHABILATES 2.0 is a weekend wellness escape tucked in the jungle, just 15 minutes from KLCC at the iconic Tamarind Springs, Ampang. Brought to you by Alas, it's a full-day experience built around three things: movement, matcha, and really good food. Choose from 14 Pilates and Yoga classes by the pool, led by Nara Move and Bobbi's Pole Studio Malaysia — pick the sessions that suit you and move at your own pace, surrounded by nature. Pair that with a matcha tasting by Chaboys and a curated Farmers Market with 16 food and drink vendors. The Farmers Market is open to the public too — but the poolside classes and matcha session are exclusively for ticket holders. This is the reset your body and mind have been waiting for.

IRA4MA is a Malaysian experimental electronic artist creating immersive, fragmented soundscapes that blend glitch, ambient, and club-adjacent textures. Mister Two Five is a Malaysian rap artist known for his raw, conversational flow and culturally grounded storytelling. Their music explores themes of memory, distance, and emotional tension, delivered through atmospheric and dynamic live performances. Join us for an intimate afternoon with Shikin Gomez as she shares the realities of building a career in fashion—from getting signed and attending castings to negotiating contracts, working internationally, and creating longevity in an industry that's constantly evolving. The workshop includes: Runway fundamental Live mock casting experiences Agencies, castings, digitals & self tapes Complimentary snapshots by a guest photographer Contracts & industry expectations Professionalism on and off set Building a sustainable modelling career Open Q&A with Shikin Gomez Throughout the afternoon, participants will also take part in a live Mock Casting Experience , stepping into a real casting environment, receiving direction, and understanding what clients and agencies are actually looking for. Whether you're just beginning your modelling journey, already represented by an agency, or simply curious about how the industry really works, this session is designed to leave you with a clearer understanding of the business behind the image. title: SS pres. LB aka Labat (DJ Set)
summary: SaturdaySelects presents LB aka Labat Saturday, 8 August 2026 · Lane 23, Kuala Lumpur We're bringing one of the most exciting names in contemporary club music to KL for the third time. LB aka Labat comes to Lane 23 on August 8th for a night that doesn't stay in its lane — fusing filtered house, techno, UKG and hard house into something that hits hard and lingers long after the lights come on. About LB aka Labat Born in Strasbourg and raised between France and India, LB aka Labat has been behind the decks since the age of 7 — inheriting turntables from his older brother and never looking back. By 15 he was playing nightclubs with a preference for Detroit and minimal techno. By 20 he'd relocated to Lyon, built a residency at Café Galerie, and landed his first international gigs. A Boiler Room session and countless tours later, he's established himself as one of the standout DJ-producers of his generation. His sets are arm-swinging, sweat-inducing, body-shaking experiences that build a bold bridge between the feverish energy of 90s rave culture and the mutant hybridisations of modern dance music. As a DJ, producer, and label owner, Labat is a vibrant representative of a new wave that celebrates club culture in all its diversity — and refuses to be boxed in by genre. Tickets available now. Doors: 10.00pm · Lane 23, Kuala Lumpur

title: POST presents Ali Live in KL
summary: POST presents Ali علي — Live in Kuala Lumpur for the first time. Founded by Arswandaru and John Paul Patton, Ali are a Jakarta-based trio whose music draws from centuries of Arab-Indonesian cultural exchange — middle eastern melodies filtered through 70s Indonesian psychedelic funk, cinematic soul, afrobeat, and disco. Arabic lyrics. Hypnotic grooves. A sound they describe as "Middle Eastern beats with Southeast twists." Their debut album Malaka — named after the historic Malacca Strait, where Arab influence first reached the archipelago — introduced a band with a genuinely distinct point of view. The follow-up EP Patterns earned them a KEXP session and a write-up that compared them to Glass Beams and Khruangbin at their most extroverted. In 2025, they made their US debut at SXSW, were named Best International Music by Austin Monthly, and followed it with a 12-show run across eight European countries. This is their first show in Malaysia. One night only. With support from Sayyid el MuuTayyib, whose debut EP southeast asian hadhrami jungle threads Yemeni arabesque through jungle breaks, turning the west's own sonic vocabulary back on itself. 14 August 2026 · Vox Live · 9PM

title: Magical Disney Night
venue: Multipurpose Hall, UTAR Sungai Long Campus
summary: Magical Disney Charity Symphony Night What if doing good could feel magical? Disney Charity Symphony Night is more than just an orchestra concert—it's an evening where Disney magic meets a meaningful cause. We believe music should be for everyone, so instead of waiting for people to discover orchestral music, we bring music to the people through the Disney songs we all know and love. Performed by the PJ Philharmonic Orchestra Association (PJPOA), enjoy your favourite Disney melodies brought to life by a full symphony orchestra. Whether you're a Disney fan, planning a family outing, looking for a unique date night, or simply wanting to support a good cause, this is an experience you won't want to miss. More Than a Concert Every ticket supports the Menses Health Organisation (MHO) in its mission to end period poverty and promote menstrual equity through education, advocacy, and community initiatives. Come for the music, stay for the memories, and leave knowing you've made a difference. Event Details Date: Saturday, 12 September 2026 Time: 7:00 PM(Admission starts at 6:00 PM) Venue: Multipurpose Hall, UTAR Sungai Long Campus Performed by: PJ Philharmonic Orchestra Association (PJPOA) Ticket Information General Admission: RM100 Students & Seniors: RM40 Before the Concert • Doors open at 6:00 PM. • Come early and explore our Experience Zone! Enjoy sponsor booths, exclusive offers, product showcases, and fun activities before the concert starts. Important Notes • Please be seated before 7:00 PM. Late admission may only be allowed during suitable intervals. • Photography without flash is permitted. Video recording and live streaming are prohibited. • Smart casual or formal attire is recommended. • Public parking is available at the open parking area beside the venue for your convenience. Join Us Experience the magic of Disney, enjoy a spectacular live orchestra, and support a meaningful cause - all in one unforgettable evening. Experience the magic. Share the joy. Create an impact. ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 迪士尼慈善交响音乐之夜 如果，做公益也可以充满魔法呢？ Disney 慈善交响音乐之夜，不仅是一场音乐会，更是一场融合迪士尼魔法与公益精神的难忘体验。 我们相信，音乐不该只属于音乐厅，而应该走进每个人的生活。因此，我们希望透过大家耳熟能详的迪士尼经典旋律，把交响乐带到更多人身边，让更多人感受现场演奏的魅力。 本次音乐会将由 PJ Philharmonic Orchestra Association（PJPOA） 倾情演出，以完整交响乐团现场演奏多首经典迪士尼歌曲。不论您是迪士尼迷、想与家人共度美好时光、寻找特别约会体验，或只是希望支持一项有意义的公益活动，这都将是一场不容错过的夜晚。 不只是一场音乐会 每一张门票，都将支持 Menses Health Organisation（MHO） 推动消除经期贫困（Period Poverty）及月经平权（Menstrual Equity），透过教育、倡导及社区计划，让更多有需要的人获得经期用品与相关知识。 来到这里，不只是欣赏音乐，更是在享受美好夜晚的同时，为社会带来一点改变。 活动详情 日期： 2026年9月12日（星期六） 时间： 晚上7:00（下午6:00开放入场） 地点： UTAR Sungai Long Campus 多用途礼堂 演出单位： PJ Philharmonic Orchestra Association（PJPOA） 门票资讯 普通票： RM100 学生及乐龄票： RM40 入场前 • 下午6:00开放入场。 • 欢迎提早抵达，逛逛我们的 Experience Zone！现场设有赞助商展位、独家优惠、产品展示及趣味互动活动，让您在音乐会开始前也能尽情体验。 温馨提醒 • 请于晚上7:00前入座，迟到者须待适当时段方可入场。 • 现场允许不使用闪光灯拍照，禁止录影及现场直播。 • 建议穿着 Smart Casual 或正式服装。 • 场馆旁设有公共停车位，方便来宾停车。 与我们一起创造美好的夜晚 在迪士尼经典旋律中，感受交响乐的魅力；在享受音乐的同时，也为月经平权贡献一份力量。 让音乐传递温暖，让善意创造改变。
